chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appl. No.796 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of MA 10210/2024. 19.11.2024. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Addl. P.G. a/w Insp. Muhammad Ibrahim P.S. Jamshed Quarters. = I have heard learned counsel for applicant, who has challenged order dated 27.07.2024 passed on an application u/s 22-A & B Cr.P.C. filed by respondent No.4 for registration of FIR against applicant. This application after hearing has been disposed of by the learned Justice of Peace directing the SHO to record statement of respondent No.4 and act upon it in terms of section 154 Cr.P.C. if cognizable offence is made out. Learned counsel for applicant has pointed out some facts which cannot be determined unless a proper investigation is carried out, hence learned APG has also supported the impugned order. In view of above, this Cr. Misc. Application is dismissed alongwith listed application. The Cr. Misc. Application stands disposed of. JUDGE A.K
